situation: Brian said he sent Fasanara v2 comments to Alex on Slack. I had flagged it as an open item on Brian twice, saying the gap was real. The evidence was there all along: Alex sent a 4:46 PM DM saying Thanks Brian - will take a look and come back, which is a clear receipt acknowledgment. I missed it both times and made Brian defend himself.
lesson: When checking whether Brian sent something to Alex on Slack, look for short acknowledgment messages like Thanks, will take a look or Thanks Brian - will review as confirmation that Brian sent something immediately prior. Do not flag an item as open on Brian without first scanning for these receipt patterns in the DM thread. Brian corrected me twice on this - highest value signal.
